defs: A combination of people for an evil purpose; an agreement, between two or more persons, to commit a crime in concert, as treason; a plot.
quotes: When shapen was all his conspiracy From point to point.
I had forgot that foul conspiracy
Of the beast Caliban and his confederates.

defs: A concurrence or general tendency, as of circumstances, to one event, as if by agreement.
quotes: A conspiracy in all heavenly and earthly things.

defs: An agreement, manifesting itself in words or deeds, by which two or more persons confederate to do an unlawful act, or to use unlawful to do an act which is lawful; confederacy.
